channel.title: roxy (SSD)
channel.description: Here i'll give new roms for ya.

item.title: thanks for subsricbs!!!
item.description: Check out roms 1-3 if you haven't... how did you even get here?

item.title: roms 4 and 5 are out now!
item.description: apologies for the wait... I know there isn't a scheduele, but i still feel bad...
